log.context:
**Root cause and fix summary:**

**Root cause:** `MemoryMax=512M` was set in the installed systemd unit (`~/.config/systemd/user/clunger.service`), but the source of truth in `~/work/claude-config/systemd/user/clunger.service` had `MemoryMax=2G`. The sync script only copied settings.json/CLAUDE.md/skills — it never synced systemd service files. During congress sessions, clunger spawns 3-4 simultaneous claude CLI subprocesses for debaters, which collectively push memory well past 512MB (observed ...(truncated)
